title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Airtable Cli — Airtable API client: bases, tables, records with pagination,...
content:
Airtable API client: bases, tables, records with pagination, CSV import/export, rate-limit awareness

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/airtable-cli
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/airtable-cli
